query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `drive_routes` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `uid` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `campaign_id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  `name` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `geojson_json` JSON,
  `checkpoints_json` JSON,
  `expected_duration_min` INT DEFAULT 30,
  `distance_km` VARCHAR(20),
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_drive_routes_campaign` (`campaign_id`, `created_at` DESC)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `drive_devices` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `uid` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `campaign_id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  `name` VARCHAR(255),
  `device_type` ENUM('ANDROID','MODEM','CPE','LAPTOP') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ANDROID',
  `model` VARCHAR(255),
  `os_version` VARCHAR(100),
  `imei` VARCHAR(50),
  `phone_number` VARCHAR(50),
  `diag_capable` BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  `tools_enabled` JSON,
  `notes` TEXT,
  `meta_json` JSON,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_drive_devices_campaign` (`campaign_id`, `created_at` DESC)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `drive_probe_links` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `uid` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `campaign_id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  `probe_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `role` ENUM('COLLECTOR','MONITOR','SPAN_TAP') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'COLLECTOR',
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_drive_probe_links_campaign` (`campaign_id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `drive_jobs` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `uid` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `campaign_id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  `route_id` VARCHAR(36),
  `device_id` VARCHAR(36),
  `job_type` ENUM('CAPTURE','UPLOAD','ANALYZE','EXPORT','OTHER') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CAPTURE',
  `status` ENUM('QUEUED','RUNNING','COMPLETED','FAILED','CANCELED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'QUEUED',
  `progress` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `params_json` JSON,
  `result_json` JSON,
  `error_message` TEXT,
  `created_by` VARCHAR(64),
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `started_at` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  `finished_at` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  INDEX `idx_drive_jobs_campaign` (`campaign_id`, `created_at` DESC),
  INDEX `idx_drive_jobs_status` (`status`, `created_at` DESC)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `drive_devices` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `uid` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `campaign_id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  `name` VARCHAR(255),
  `device_type` ENUM('ANDROID','MODEM','CPE','LAPTOP') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ANDROID',
  `model` VARCHAR(255),

  `meta_json` JSON,

  `updated_at` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_drive_devices_campaign` (`campaign_id`, `created_at` DESC)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `drive_probe_links` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `uid` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `campaign_id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  `probe_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `role` ENUM('COLLECTOR','MONITOR','SPAN_TAP') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'COLLECTOR',
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_drive_probe_links_campaign` (`campaign_id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `drive_jobs` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `uid` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `campaign_id` VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL,
  `route_id` VARCHAR(36),
  `device_id` VARCHAR(36),
  `job_type` ENUM('CAPTURE','UPLOAD','ANALYZE','EXPORT','OTHER') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CAPTURE',
  `status` ENUM('QUEUED','RUNNING','COMPLETED','FAILED','CANCELED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'QUEUED',
  `progress` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `params_json` JSON,
  `result_json` JSON,
  `error_message` TEXT,
  `created_by` VARCHAR(64),
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `started_at` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  `finished_at` TIMESTAMP NULL,
  INDEX `idx_drive_jobs_campaign` (`campaign_id`, `created_at` DESC),
  INDEX `idx_drive_jobs_status` (`status`, `created_at` DESC)
);
